Headline: Merger - Keys Academies Trust and Thomas Deacon Education Trust (State), Peterborough
Info: David Atter has been appointed as the new chief executive to lead the proposed merger of Keys Academies Trust and Thomas Deacon Education Trust, which will form the new Deacon Keys Trust pending DfE approval.

Headline: Closure - Manorbier Church in Wales Primary School (State), Pembrokeshire
Info: Senior councillors are set to consider a request for an independent inquiry into the controversial handling of the school's closure, following significant local opposition and a petition.

Headline: Closure - Llandinam Primary School (State), Powys
Info: Following the school's final day of operation last week, the local council's cabinet has faced severe criticism over the closure process and the lack of financial support for parents purchasing new uniforms.

Headline: Closure - Middle Street Primary School (State), Brighton
Info: An independent review has been launched into the governance and financial challenges that led to the permanent closure of Middle Street Primary School. The state school is set to shut on 31 August 2026 following a significant budget deficit and falling pupil numbers.

Headline: Closure - LIPA School (State), Liverpool
Info: LIPA School has permanently closed its doors following a tumultuous period marked by financial deficits, falling pupil numbers, and a failed High Court legal challenge by parents to reverse the decision.

Headline: Acquisition - Kirkham Grammar School, Lancashire
Info: Kirkham Grammar School has been acquired by the international education group Maharishi Mahesh Yogi Sanstha (MMYS) to secure its long-term future amid financial pressures exacerbated by the introduction of VAT on independent school fees.

Headline: Financial - Stoke College, Suffolk
Info: Following the recent permanent closure of independent Stoke College due to financial pressures and the introduction of VAT on fees, a family has reported losing £35,000 in prepaid fees. This highlights the severe financial fallout and messy aftermath of the school's sudden collapse.
